description: Observe: pm_structuring WP attribution — parent_item_id and initial_marker in extracted task items

setup.input_text:
## Platform Integration

- Set up CI pipeline for automated builds
- Write API documentation for external developers
- Configure monitoring alerts for production services

items.description: Set up CI pipeline for automated builds
Write API documentation for external developers
Configure monitoring alerts for production services

contract_conformance.parent_item_id_set: PASS — all task items reference the WP UUID
contract_conformance.item_type_blocktype: PASS — item_type is 'task' (blockType canonical, not 'Task' pageType)
contract_conformance.wp_item_unmodified: PASS — WP item has parent_item_id: null, initial_marker: null
contract_conformance.initial_marker_populated: PASS — field present and non-null for all task items

anomaly_noted.issue: initial_marker is 'CANCELLED' for all task items
anomaly_noted.cause: Default marker is alphabetically first over production schema markers: CANCELLED, DOING, DONE, TODO, WAITING
anomaly_noted.severity: LOW — matches task_model behavior exactly (same alphabetical-sort logic)
anomaly_noted.mitigation: Schema marker naming (C, D, D, T, W) puts CANCELLED first. Pre-existing task_model behavior. Noting for Stage 7 Reconcile.
anomaly_noted.f16_conformance: PASS — behavior matches contract (alphabetical-first marker, matching task_model)
